[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1100100 3
2 1101101 5
3 1101011 5
4 0100110 3
5 0001101 3
6 0110011 4
7 0100010 2

67 76 0101001 3
70 07 1100100 3 match 1
